# PI Planning Template (SAFe)

## Purpose
Provide a structured framework for SAFe Program Increment (PI) Planning to align multiple teams
on vision, objectives, dependencies, and delivery commitments.

## Audience
Release Train Engineer, Product Management, System Architect, Scrum Masters, Agile Teams,
Business Owners, Key Stakeholders.

## Event Profile
- **Duration:** 2 days (typical)
- **Frequency:** Every 8–12 weeks
- **Participants:** 50–125 per ART

## Inputs
- Program backlog and top features
- Architecture runway and enablers
- Team capacity and velocity data
- Dependency map and known risks

---

## Pre-Planning Checklist
### 30 Days Before
- [ ] Vision and roadmap refreshed
- [ ] Top 10 features prioritized and refined
- [ ] Dependencies identified across teams
- [ ] Capacity calculations completed
- [ ] Logistics confirmed (venue/platform, tooling)

### 1 Week Before
- [ ] Agenda finalized and distributed
- [ ] Team breakouts assigned
- [ ] Program board prepared
- [ ] Confidence vote materials ready

---

## PI Planning Agenda

### Day 1
| Time | Activity | Facilitator | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | Welcome & business context | Business Owner | Context shared |
|  | Product/Solution vision | Product Manager | Vision aligned |
|  | Architecture vision | System Architect | Technical alignment |
|  | Planning context & guidance | RTE | Expectations set |
|  | Team breakouts #1 | Scrum Masters | Draft plans |
|  | Team breakouts #2 | Scrum Masters | Refinements |
|  | Draft plan review | RTE | Dependencies surfaced |
|  | Management review | RTE | Issues resolved |
|  | Day 1 wrap-up | RTE | Next steps |

### Day 2
| Time | Activity | Facilitator | Outcome |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | Day 2 opening | RTE | Alignment refreshed |
|  | Team breakouts #3 | Scrum Masters | Final plans |
|  | Final plan review | RTE | Commitments shared |
|  | Program board walkthrough | RTE | Dependencies confirmed |
|  | Confidence vote | RTE | Commitment validated |
|  | Planning retrospective | RTE | Improvements captured |
|  | Wrap-up | Business Owner | Closeout |

---

## Team Breakout Structure

### Session 1: Story & Dependency Identification
- Review top features and objectives
- Identify stories and estimate
- Map dependencies and risks

### Session 2: Plan Refinement
- Resolve dependencies
- Validate capacity and commitments
- Update risks and assumptions

### Session 3: Final Planning
- Finalize iteration plans
- Prepare PI objectives presentation
- Assess confidence

---

## Program Board Template
```
Program Board - PI [X] - [Quarter/Year]

Team            | Iter 1 | Iter 2 | Iter 3 | Iter 4 | Iter 5 | PI Objectives
----------------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|---------------
Team Alpha      |        |        |        |        |        |
Team Beta       |        |        |        |        |        |
Team Gamma      |        |        |        |        |        |
Milestones      |        |        |        |        |        |
```

---

## Confidence Vote

### Vote Scale
- **5:** High confidence
- **4:** Confident with minor concerns
- **3:** Some concerns
- **2:** Low confidence
- **1:** Very low confidence
- **0:** No confidence

### Vote Tracking
| Team | Vote 1 | Concerns | Adjustments | Vote 2 | Final |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

---

## RAID Log

### Risks
| ID | Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation | Owner | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

### Assumptions
| ID | Assumption | Validation Plan | Owner | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

### Issues
| ID | Issue | Impact | Resolution Plan | Owner | Target Date | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

### Dependencies
| ID | Dependency | Dependent Team | Provider Team | Needed By | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

---

## Post-PI Planning Actions
### Within 24 Hours
- [ ] Distribute PI objectives and commitments
- [ ] Publish program board updates
- [ ] Share RAID log

### Within 1 Week
- [ ] Load objectives into tracking tools
- [ ] Set up iteration planning cadence
- [ ] Schedule dependency syncs
